x-enumeration-literals.name: Product Issues
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defective or malfunctioning products.
Incorrect or damaged items received.
Issues with product performance or quality.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Issues
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Poor customer service interactions.
Delays in service delivery or support.
Incorrect or inadequate service provided.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Billing and Payment Issues
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incorrect charges or billing errors.
Problems with refunds or returns.
Issues with payment processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Technical Issues
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Problems with software or applications.
Website outages or functionality issues.
Difficulty in accessing services or accounts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Logistics and Delivery Issues
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Delayed or lost shipments.
Incorrect delivery addresses.
Problems with delivery tracking.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Policy and Procedure Issues
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Disputes over company policies.
Miscommunication or lack of clarity about terms and conditions.
Issues with warranties or guarantees.
